headline: Williams Cos. nears $5.5 billion Momentum Midstream deal
summary: Investing.com -- Williams Cos. is reportedly in advanced discussions to acquire natural gas pipeline operator Momentum Midstream for approximately $5.5 billion which will be the largest transaction in Williams’ history.

content.title: Williams Cos. nears $5.5 billion Momentum Midstream deal
content.summary: Investing.com -- Williams Cos. is reportedly in advanced discussions to acquire natural gas pipeline operator Momentum Midstream for approximately $5.5 billion which will be the largest transaction in Williams’ history.

headline: Williams Said to Near $5.5 Billion Deal for Momentum Midstream
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Williams Cos. is in advanced talks to acquire rival natural gas pipeline operator Momentum Midstream for about $5.5 billion in what would be one of its largest deals ever, people familiar with the matter said.Most Read from BloombergUS Launches Fresh Strikes on Iran Targets After Drone HitsAnthropic’s Mythos 5 AI Model Cleared by US for Wider UseLutnick Delayed Canada Bridge Debut to Seek Bigger Cut of Toll RevenueAn Analyst’s Missed Remark Surfaced in Deadly Iran School Strike Pr
